scripts.start: concurrently -k -n watch,api,web "npm run start:watch" "npm run start:flask" "npm run start:web"
scripts.start:api: concurrently -k -n watch,api "npm run start:watch" "npm run start:flask"
scripts.start:flask: set FLASK_ENV=development&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& set PYTHONPATH=.&& venv\Scripts\python.exe -m flask --app src.server run --debug --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.start:watch: set PYTHONPATH=.&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& venv\Scripts\python.exe -m src.reports.watch
scripts.docker:publish: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push
scripts.docker:start: docker rm -f portfolio-tracker && docker run --name portfolio-tracker --env-file .env.prod -p 5000:8000 docker.rajrai.net/portfolio-tracker:latest
